title: Hexical
description: A fun little kitchen sink-like Hexcasting addon with all the things I find cool!
body:
A fun addon containing genie lamps, mage blocks, specks, world scrying, and more! The full feature list is way too big to describe here so here are the highlights:
- genie lamps: a casting device that casts twenty times per second when you hold right-click
- arch genie lamps: an upgraded form that casts twenty times per second while in your inventory
- specks: floating iota you can conjure into your world. They can even be moved, rotated, and otherwise edited for free once in the world!
- meshes: drawing lines in 3D space!
- mage blocks: conjurable blocks with a suite of modifiers, like breaking in a chain reaction, easily swapping out with real blocks, disappearing after a set duration, being bouncy, and more!
- conjured staff: a hex preprogrammed into it and a battery, as well as a rank. After you left and right-click a number of times equal to the rank, they cast with the stack starting with true and false booleans corresponding to your left and right clicks. They also support an internal iota storage, which allows them to retain memory of previous inputs. Includes multiple textures too! Essentially my attempt at the "perfect" casting item
- telepathy: see how long you've held WASD, Space, or a dedicated telepathy key. Also play sounds and display iotas in your action bar
- grimoires: Hexal macros but in item form! You can write pattern-to-hex bindings and when you draw the pattern with a staff, it instead casts the hex
- living scrolls: decorative scrolls that wiggle just like staff-drawn patterns. They can also display pattern lists, where they rotate between patterns, all in sync
- two methods of cheap teleportation if you are willing to build the circle/do the math
- fully in depth pyrotechnics spell that can fire fireworks of your exact specifications!
- a whole host of useful scrying patterns for getting information from the world
- contains likely the most meta-evaluation patterns of any addon and even the base mod
- you can now move around while having the spellcasting screen open and write to abacuses now!
